mapper.sql: a.id, a.emp_id, a.attendance_date, a.check_in_time, a.check_out_time, a.work_hours, a.status, a.check_in_location, a.check_out_location, a.create_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_attendance a WHERE a.emp_id = #{empId} AND a.attendance_date = CURDATE()
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_attendance (emp_id, attendance_date, check_in_time, check_out_time, work_hours, status, check_in_location, check_out_location) VALUES (#{empId}, #{attendanceDate}, #{checkInTime}, #{checkOutTime}, #{workHours}, #{status}, #{checkInLocation}, #{checkOutLocation})
mapper.select: SELECT , e.emp_name, e.emp_no, d.dept_name FROM sys_attendance a LEFT JOIN sys_emp e ON a.emp_id = e.id LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON e.dept_id = d.id WHERE YEAR(a.attendance_date) = #{year} AND MONTH(a.attendance_date) = #{month} ORDER BY d.id, a.emp_id, a.attendance_date
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT emp_id) FROM sys_attendance WHERE attendance_date = CURDATE() AND status IN (1, 2, 3)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT emp_id) as actual, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 2 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as late, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 3 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as early_leave, SUM(CASE WHEN status = 4 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as absent FROM sys_attendance WHERE attendance_date = #{date}

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT a.attendance_date) as working_days, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_emp WHERE dept_id = #{deptId} AND emp_status = 1) as expected_count, COUNT(DISTINCT a.emp_id) as actual_count FROM sys_attendance a LEFT JOIN sys_emp e ON a.emp_id = e.id WHERE e.dept_id = #{deptId} AND DATE_FORMAT(a.attendance_date, '%Y-%m') = #{month}
